title: Aspirin
content: Aspirin is used for pain relief and fever reduction. Side effects include nausea and stomach pain. Standard dosage is 500mg. Warning: Do not take with alcohol. May interact with blood thinners.

title: Ibuprofen
content: Ibuprofen is a nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) used for treating pain, fever, and inflammation. Dosages range from 200mg to 800mg every 6 to 8 hours.
